name: IdsDmMbrshDmMbrBeKeyXrefExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_1 AS (SELECT P.SRC_SYS_CD, P.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, P.INDV_BE_KEY FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_MBR_BE_KEY_XREF P JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR MBR ON P.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = MBR.MBR_UNIQ_KEY WHERE P.SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND P.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.LastProcessedDate}' AND MBR.HOST_MBR_IN <> 'Y') SELECT cte_1.INDV_BE_KEY, cte_1.SRC_SYS_CD, cte_1.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM cte_1
